lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Oy! Naku, bagong mukha! Magandang umaga, anak!
lines.english: Oh! A new face! Good morning, child!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Ako si Aling Nena, kapitbahay mo dito sa tabi-tabi. Welcome sa Baryo Alon!
lines.english: I'm Aling Nena, your neighbor right next door. Welcome to Baryo Alon!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Dito sa amin, lahat magkakilala. Parang isang malaking pamilya lang, ha?
lines.english: Here with us, everyone knows each other. Like one big family, okay?

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Kumain ka na ba? Naku, hindi puwedeng walang almusal! Teka, may kanin pa ako dito at bangus.
lines.english: Have you eaten yet? You can't skip breakfast! Wait, I still have rice and milkfish here.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Kung kailangan mo ng kahit ano — tubig, pagkain, tulong — kumatok ka lang sa pinto ko, ha? Huwag kang mahiya.
lines.english: If you need anything — water, food, help — just knock on my door, okay? Don't be shy.

choices.tagalog: Salamat po, Aling Nena! Ang bait niyo po.
choices.english: Thank you, Aling Nena! You're so kind.

choices.tagalog: Hindi pa po ako kumain... gutom na ako.
choices.english: I haven't eaten yet... I'm hungry.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Oy, magandang umaga ulit! Nandito ka na naman, ha? Mabuti naman!
lines.english: Hey, good morning again! Here you are again, huh? That's good!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Kumain ka na ba? Naku, sabihin mo sa akin ng totoo.
lines.english: Have you eaten yet? Oh, tell me the truth.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Kung hindi pa, upo ka muna sa upuan. May mainit na kape at pandesal dito.
lines.english: If not yet, sit down on the chair first. There's hot coffee and bread here.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Kung gusto mo pang bumili, puntahan mo si Ate Merly sa sari-sari store sa Sentro. Mabait 'yon, pero chismosa rin. Hehe.
lines.english: If you want to buy more, visit Ate Merly at the sari-sari store in the town center. She's nice, but gossipy too. Hehe.

choices.tagalog: Opo, kakain na po ako! Salamat!
choices.english: Yes, I'll eat now! Thank you!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Anak! Tanghali na! Ang init-init sa labas — bakit ka naglalakad pa?
lines.english: Child! It's already noon! It's so hot outside — why are you still walking around?

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Halika muna dito sa loob. May ulam pa ako — sinigang. Kain muna tayo.
lines.english: Come inside first. I still have a dish — sinigang. Let's eat first.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Dito sa amin, hindi ka puwedeng lumakad nang walang laman ang tiyan. Ang kain ang pinaka-importante!
lines.english: Here with us, you can't go around on an empty stomach. Eating is the most important!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Tapos doon sa lamesa, kumuha ka ng tubig. Baka ma-dehydrate ka pa diyan.
lines.english: Then over at the table, get some water. You might get dehydrated.

choices.tagalog: Opo, Aling Nena. Kakain na po ako.
choices.english: Yes, Aling Nena. I'll eat now.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Oy, magandang hapon! Nagluluto ako ng adobo. Halika, turuan kita!
lines.english: Hey, good afternoon! I'm cooking adobo. Come, I'll teach you!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Una, kailangan mo ng kawali — yan, yung malaking pan na 'yan. Pang-gisa.
lines.english: First, you need a kawali — that, that big pan. For sauteing.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Tapos igisa mo ang bawang at sibuyas. Naamoy mo na ba? 'Yan ang amoy ng Pilipinas!
lines.english: Then saute the garlic and onions. Can you smell it? That's the smell of the Philippines!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Lagyan mo ng toyo at suka. Huwag kalimutan! At sili, kung gusto mo ng anghang.
lines.english: Add soy sauce and vinegar. Don't forget! And chili, if you want it spicy.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Tapos lutuin mo sa palayok nang matagal. Dahan-dahan lang. Ang luto, parang buhay — kailangan ng pasensya.
lines.english: Then cook it in the pot for a long time. Nice and slow. Cooking, like life — it needs patience.

choices.tagalog: Salamat po sa pagtuturo! Susubukan ko po!
choices.english: Thank you for teaching me! I'll try it!

choices.tagalog: Ang sarap naman po ng amoy!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Anak, magandang gabi. Upo ka muna, kwentuhan tayo.
lines.english: Child, good evening. Sit down first, let's share stories.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Noong bata pa ako, dito na ako sa barangay na 'to. Walang kuryente noon, ilaw lang ng kandila.
lines.english: When I was young, I was already here in this barangay. No electricity back then, just candlelight.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Ang tatay ko, mangingisda rin, tulad ni Tatay Andoy. Gabi-gabi, dala niya ang isda, tapos magluluto ang nanay ko.
lines.english: My father was also a fisherman, like Tatay Andoy. Every night, he'd bring fish, then my mother would cook.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Ang buhay dito, simple lang. Kanin, ulam, pamilya. 'Yan lang ang kailangan mo.
lines.english: Life here is simple. Rice, a dish, family. That's all you need.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Sige, matulog ka na. Kumuha ka ng kumot, malamig ngayong gabi. Bukas ulit, ha?
lines.english: Alright, go to sleep now. Get a blanket, it's cold tonight. See you tomorrow, okay?

choices.tagalog: Magandang gabi po, Aling Nena. Salamat sa kwento.
choices.english: Good night, Aling Nena. Thank you for the story.

choices.tagalog: May kwento pa po ba kayo?

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Oy, nandito ka pala! Kumusta ka naman?
lines.english: Oh, you're here! How are you?

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Huwag mong kalimutan kumain, ha? At uminom ng tubig. Importante 'yan.
lines.english: Don't forget to eat, okay? And drink water. That's important.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Kung gusto mong mag-explore, puntahan mo si Kapitan Rody sa munisipyo. Baka may trabaho siya para sa iyo.
lines.english: If you want to explore, visit Kapitan Rody at the municipal hall. He might have work for you.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Ay, para sa akin 'yan? Naku, ikaw talaga! Salamat, anak!
lines.english: Oh, that's for me? Oh, you! Thank you, child!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Si Kapitan Rody ba ang nagpadala? Ay, mabait talaga 'yun kahit mukhang seryoso lagi.
lines.english: Did Kapitan Rody send you? He's really kind even though he always looks serious.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Teka, huwag kang umalis nang walang dala. Eto, dalhin mo 'tong pandesal pabalik. Para sa iyo 'yan.
lines.english: Wait, don't leave empty-handed. Here, take this bread back. That's for you.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Ganyan kami dito sa Baryo Alon — walang pumupunta nang walang pasalubong, walang umaalis nang walang dala!
lines.english: That's how we are here in Baryo Alon — nobody comes without a gift, nobody leaves empty-handed!

choices.tagalog: Salamat po! Ang bait niyo talaga.
choices.english: Thank you! You're really so kind.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Alam mo ba, turuan na kita ng mga salita tungkol sa bahay. Importante 'yan!
lines.english: You know what, let me teach you words about the house. That's important!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Yan ang pinto — 'yung pinupasukan mo. Tapos 'yung nandoon sa taas, 'yun ang bubong.
lines.english: That's the door — what you enter through. Then the one up there, that's the roof.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Ang sahig ang tinatapakan mo. Ang pader, 'yung nasa gilid. At 'yung liwanag, 'yun ang ilaw.
lines.english: The floor is what you step on. The wall, that's on the side. And the brightness, that's the light.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Tapos, ang bintana — buksan mo 'yan para pumasok ang hangin. Lalo na pag mainit!
lines.english: Then, the window — open it to let the wind in. Especially when it's hot!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: At 'yung pinatutulugan mo? Kama 'yun. May unan at kumot para matulog nang mahimbing.
lines.english: And what you sleep on? That's the bed. With a pillow and blanket to sleep soundly.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Ha? Marami na ba? Huwag kang mag-alala, mauulit-ulit din natin 'yan. Dahan-dahan lang!
lines.english: Huh? Too many already? Don't worry, we'll keep repeating those. Take it slow!

choices.english: Thank you! I'm learning a lot!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Magandang hapon! Nag-iinit na naman ng walis. Ang dumi-dumi sa labas, grabe.
lines.english: Good afternoon! I'm wielding the broom again. It's so dirty outside, unbelievable.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Alam mo, ang walis at sabon, 'yun ang armas ng isang maayos na bahay!
lines.english: You know, the broom and soap, those are the weapons of a proper household!

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Pagkatapos maglinis, ilagay mo ang basura sa tamang lugar. 'Yan ang turo sa amin ni Nanay ko.
lines.english: After cleaning, put the trash in the right place. That's what my mother taught us.

lines.speaker: aling_nena
lines.tagalog: Tapos, 'pag tapos na ang lahat, magpahinga ka. Kumuha ka ng tuwalya at maligo ka. Kailangan mo 'yan pagkatapos ng mahabang araw!
lines.english: Then, when everything's done, rest. Get a towel and take a bath. You need that after a long day!

choices.tagalog: Pagod na po ako, Aling Nena...
